title: R1 RCM - Revenue Operating System for Real-Time Adjudication
problem: Healthcare revenue cycle is fragmented, manual, and slow. Claims take weeks to adjudicate, denials are high, and providers lose revenue to administrative drag.
solution: Phare: Healthcare's First Revenue Operating System. AI agents orchestrated across the entire revenue cycle. R37 AI lab builds specialized agents for claims, eligibility, and denials. Goal: real-time adjudication.
technology: AI agents, reasoning models, voice AI, capture AI, RPA
ai_type: AI agents, reasoning, language, voice models
traction_signals: Operating partnerships with major health systems
funding: Public company (RCM), taken private by TowerBrook
varden_fit: CRITICAL — R1's concept of a 'Revenue Operating System' with AI agents is exactly the future of healthcare infrastructure. European healthcare systems need this model.
notes: CONTRARIAN: Real-time adjudication is the holy grail. R1's AI lab approach shows how to build infrastructure that aligns payer and provider incentives.
